allow: PowerShell(dotnet run --no-build -- account cleartest 2>&1 | Select-String "Cleared"; dotnet run --no-build -- query "Elder Wood Log" 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore|Executed DbCommand|^\\s+\(SELECT|FROM|WHERE|ORDER|LIMIT|launchSettings|Die Start\)' } | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5202 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Listening on 5202 \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique\)\)" } else { "NOT listening on 5202" })
